title: ADR-0199: Add OTEL emissions to loop stages
description: Add system_knowledge.retrieval OTEL event emission to reviewer, judge, test-writer, and planner — matching the existing pattern in implement.ts. Each stage already calls querySystemKnowledge; just needs the OTEL emit wrapping it.

stories.title: Add OTEL emission to reviewer system_knowledge retrieval
stories.description: In packages/system-bus/src/inngest/functions/agent-loop/review.ts, wrap the existing querySystemKnowledge call with timing and emit an OTEL event matching implement.ts pattern. Emit to the /observability/emit endpoint (already used by implement.ts — check how implement.ts does it via the emitOtelEvent helper or direct fetch). The event should have: action='system_knowledge.retrieval', component='agent-loop', source='reviewer', success=true/false, metadata with result_length and latency_ms.
stories.acceptance: OTEL event emitted on every querySystemKnowledge call in review.ts. Compiles clean: `bunx tsc --noEmit`.

stories.title: Add OTEL emission to judge system_knowledge retrieval
stories.description: In packages/system-bus/src/inngest/functions/agent-loop/utils.ts (the llmEvaluate function), wrap the existing querySystemKnowledge call with timing and emit an OTEL event. Same pattern as implement.ts: action='system_knowledge.retrieval', component='agent-loop', source='judge', success=true/false, metadata with result_length and latency_ms.
stories.acceptance: OTEL event emitted on every querySystemKnowledge call in llmEvaluate. Compiles clean.

stories.title: Add OTEL emission to test-writer system_knowledge retrieval
stories.description: In packages/system-bus/src/inngest/functions/agent-loop/test-writer.ts, wrap the existing querySystemKnowledge call with timing and emit an OTEL event. Same pattern: action='system_knowledge.retrieval', component='agent-loop', source='test-writer'.

stories.title: Add OTEL emission to planner system_knowledge retrieval
stories.description: In packages/system-bus/src/inngest/functions/agent-loop/plan.ts, wrap the existing querySystemKnowledge call (for failed_target lookup) with timing and emit an OTEL event. Same pattern: action='system_knowledge.retrieval', component='agent-loop', source='planner'.
